LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT XOLA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON 8/24/11. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
